title: KidPlay Products Fingerlings Friendship at your Fingertips Secret Diary 7 Pieces
description:
You know that fun isn't far behind with the Fingerlings. Now you can keep that fun going with the Fingerlings Secret Diary Set. Your child will like to write down their thoughts and feelings. This set comes with a 7" x 5" Diary with lined pages, a lock with two keys, a click pen to write down your secrets with Zoe, a stamp ink pad, a stamp with Sophie, and two sticker sheets. The cover features two Baby Monkey Fingerlings Bella and Boris. It's great for travel and small enough to fit in your purse, backpack, or knapsack. It's great to give as a gift, party favor, stocking stuffer, swag bag, conference bag, goodie bag, Easter basket filler, Christmas gift, convention bag, or Holiday gift
